title: Toxic Childhood: How the Modern World is Damaging Our Children and What We Can Do About It
author: Sue Palmer
themes: Impact of modern society on children
targetAudience: Parents, educators, child psychologists, and anyone interested in child development
relatedBooks: The Disappearance of Childhood by Neil Postman
Last Child in the Woods by Richard Louv
The Emotional Life of the Toddler by Alicia F. Lieberman
keyInsights: Modern societal changes negatively impact childhood
